benchmark_source: Repo-owned CodeAtlas dogfood benchmark spanning CSS tokens, Mantine, DuckDB-Wasm, Cosmograph, backend RAG search, and required docs coverage.

cases.description: CodeAtlas repo index must be populated for solemd.graph.

observation.note: If freshness is stale, run `index_status(action='reindex', force=true, reindex_mode='all')`.

cases.description: Literal CSS token lookup should land on the canonical token file.

observation.note: Use `file_context` on the matched file or switch to `mode='semantic'` for structural results.

cases.description: Mantine theme wiring should be discoverable from the provider symbol.

observation.note: Use `file_context` on the matched file or switch to `mode='semantic'` for structural results.

cases.description: DuckDB-Wasm entrypoint wiring should be discoverable from the bundler constant.

observation.note: Use `file_context` on the matched file or switch to `mode='semantic'` for structural results.

cases.description: DuckDB remote attachment ownership should resolve to the adapter file.

observation.note: Use `file_context` on the matched file or switch to `mode='semantic'` for structural results.

cases.description: Cosmograph adapter configuration should resolve inside the adapter boundary.

observation.note: Use `file_context` on the matched file or switch to `mode='semantic'` for structural results.

cases.description: Backend repository ownership should resolve from the class name.

observation.note: Use `file_context` on the matched file or switch to `mode='semantic'` for structural results.

cases.description: Retrieval orchestration should resolve from the core function name.

observation.note: Use `file_context` on the matched file or switch to `mode='semantic'` for structural results.

cases.description: File context should expose chunks for the canonical CSS token file.

observation.note: Use `analyze_impact` for integrated risk and graph signal.

cases.description: File context should expose chunks for the backend RAG repository.

observation.note: Use `analyze_impact` for integrated risk and graph signal.

cases.description: SoleMD.Graph must have all critical frontend/runtime/backend docs libraries registered.
DuckDB should resolve as a first-class docs library for this repo.
pgvector should resolve as a first-class docs library for this repo.
Mantine docs search should return ActionIcon styling guidance.

observation.note: Use `expand_doc_chunk` or `read_doc` on the top hit for more context.

cases.description: Cosmograph docs search should return camera or selection API material.

observation.note: Use `expand_doc_chunk` or `read_doc` on the top hit for more context.

cases.description: FastAPI docs search should return dependency-injection guidance for async services.

observation.note: Use `expand_doc_chunk` or `read_doc` on the top hit for more context.
